description.en: Binary framing layer for HTTP/2. Each frame has a 9-byte header with length, type, flags and stream identifier. Enables multiplexing, server push and header compression.
description.zh: HTTP/2的二进制帧层。每帧有9字节头部，包含长度、类型、标志和流标识符。支持多路复用、服务器推送和头部压缩。

flags.zh: 帧类型相关标志 (如 END_STREAM=0x1, END_HEADERS=0x4)

streamId.zh: 流标识符 (0表示连接级帧)

payload.en: Frame payload, interpretation depends on frame type
payload.zh: 帧载荷，解释方式取决于帧类型
